questionHtml:
A plate performs simple harmonic oscillations with a frequency of 39 Hz and an amplitude of 8.0 cm.

Show that the maximum speed of the oscillating plate is about 20 m s−1.
markschemeHtml:
use of 2πfA ✓

maximum speed is 2π×39×0.080=19.6 «m s−1» ✓

 

Award [2] for a bald correct answer.

meta.title: A plate performs simple harmonic oscillations with a frequency of 39 Hz and an amplitude of 8.0 cm. Show that the maximum speed of the oscillating plate is about 20 m s−1.
